## [45:31 - 48:32]

these clients that adds a tremendous amount of friction to the deal. The client that you're working with says, oh, you're telling me I could save like, you know, fucking $70,000 a month, you know, like literally almost a million dollars a year. believe it or not, the best route is to call it out. Okay. This matters a lot.
